query: j'ai un souper de filles vendredi, quelque chose de léger et festif
notes: Social occasion, implicit: light, fun, approachable. A sommelier would suggest prosecco, crémant, or a fruity rosé — not a heavy Barolo.

query: my father-in-law is a Bordeaux snob, I want to impress him without spending 80$
notes: Budget constraint with quality signal. Tests if pipeline can find Left Bank style (Cab-dominant blends, structured tannins) at a price that impresses.

query: on fait un méchoui samedi, faut du rouge qui a du punch pour 30 personnes
notes: Lamb roast for 30 — needs bold, crowd-pleasing reds at volume-friendly prices. Côtes-du-Rhône, Malbec, GSM blends territory.

query: I had a Grüner Veltliner in Vienna and I can't stop thinking about it
notes: Taste memory query. Tests semantic understanding of a specific grape experience. Should return Austrian whites, possibly Riesling or Grüner.

query: un vin pour accompagner un plateau de fromages québécois
notes: Quebec cheese board pairing. A sommelier knows this means varied textures — needs versatile wines (Gamay, Chenin, Pinot Noir, light Syrah).

query: je veux découvrir les vins grecs
notes: Exploration query. Tests if pipeline surfaces interesting Greek wines (Assyrtiko, Xinomavro, Agiorgitiko) vs generic Mediterranean reds.

query: something crisp and minerally, like Sancerre but cheaper
notes: Reference-based query. Sancerre = Sauvignon Blanc, high acid, mineral. Should return Touraine, Quincy, or New Zealand Sauv Blanc at lower price.

query: un rouge pour boire sur le deck avec des burgers, pas compliqué
notes: Casual summer red + burgers. Wants easy-drinking: Gamay, light Grenache, unoaked blends. 'Pas compliqué' = no tannin monsters.

query: ma blonde aime le moscato, moi je trouve ça trop sucré — un compromis?
notes: Taste negotiation between two people. Tests sommelier creativity: Gewürztraminer, off-dry Riesling, Vouvray demi-sec bridge the gap.

query: je fais une blanquette de veau ce soir
notes: Classic French dish pairing. Blanquette = creamy veal stew. Textbook answer: white Burgundy, Côtes-du-Rhône blanc, or a rich Chenin.

query: organic or biodynamic red under 25$, no headaches please
notes: Natural wine request with pseudo-health framing. Tests if pipeline can filter for organic/bio wines and stay under budget.

query: j'ai bu un Tignanello une fois et j'ai jamais retrouvé ça
notes: Reference to a Super Tuscan icon. Tests if pipeline understands: Sangiovese-Cab blend, Tuscan, structured. Should suggest similar Super Tuscans or quality Chianti Classico Riserva.

query: un vin de dessert pour accompagner une tarte tatin
notes: Dessert pairing with apple tart. Sommelier territory: Sauternes, Coteaux du Layon, late-harvest Riesling, Jurançon moelleux.

query: I'm bringing wine to a dinner party, budget is 30-40$ and I want to look like I know what I'm doing
notes: Social signaling query. Needs recognizable-but-interesting: Barolo entry-level, Côte-Rôtie, good Chablis, or a respected producer name.

query: qqch de différent, je suis tanné du Cab Sauv et du Merlot
notes: Palate fatigue, wants novelty. Tests if pipeline can pivot away from mainstream: Nero d'Avola, Tannat, Blaufränkisch, Mourvèdre.

query: sparkling wine for a proposal, money is not an issue
notes: High-emotion occasion with no budget ceiling. Should return Champagne (prestige cuvées), not Prosecco. Tests if pipeline reads 'money is not an issue' correctly.

query: un rouge espagnol pour la paella de demain
notes: Spanish wine + paella. Garnacha, Tempranillo, Monastrell territory. Tests country + food pairing intersection.

query: do you have beer?
notes: Non-wine query, pipeline should handle gracefully. Kept as edge case sanity check.

query: un rosé pis un blanc pour le chalet ce weekend, max 20$ chaque
notes: Multi-intent (rosé AND white) with cottage weekend context. Tests parser flexibility and casual Quebec French ('pis').

query: j'connais rien au vin mais je veux pas avoir l'air cave au resto
notes: Beginner with social anxiety. A great sommelier picks safe-but-interesting bottles. Tests if recommendations are approachable yet not embarrassing.
